scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/ui"
scripts.dev:1: dotenv -e stack1.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/ui"
scripts.dev:2: dotenv -e stack2.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/ui"
scripts.dev:3: dotenv -e stack3.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/ui"
scripts.dev:4: dotenv -e stack4.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/ui"
scripts.dev:5: dotenv -e stack5.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/ui"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/ui
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/backend && npm run test -w apps/ui
